creator: freebsd@moov.de
text:
Version 3.1.10 was released on August 30, 2012

http://www.otrs.com/en/open-source/community-news/releases-notes/release-notes-otrs-help-desk-3110/

I'd volunteer to takeover maintainership in case the maintainer is too 
busy.
If the current maintainer agrees, please add fw@moov.de as new 
maintainer.


Thanks
- Frank
